aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Restless drive

💼 Career: Tum jaldi results chahoge, par patience ki kami progress ko affect karegi

❤️ Love: Short temper misunderstanding create kar sakta hai

💰 Money: Impulsive decision avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Slow down and align

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum rush me galat turns le lete ho
